creator: peter@FreeBSD.org
text:
The reason I ask is that going by the mail processor's behavior so far, I'd expect it to drop it on the floor if a PR arrives from a freebsd version in the field that isn't in bz already.  I doubt it'll auto-create them.

Probably is fixable, but given the mess like 2007.11-CURRENT in there already it might be an idea to convert some of those headers to body text.  Or something.  I'll yell when more turn up.
